title: Middgard Foxed
description: UNOFFICIAL 1.21.1 Neoforge port of Sbeev's Midgard mod, a total biome overhaul aimed at making Minecraft's world generation more realistic. (+ some feautres not present originally)
body:
# Middgard Foxed
This is an unofficial port of Sbeev's [Middgard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/middgard) mod for 1.20.1 Forge that I made for personal use, on modrinth so more people can enjoy it :)

## Sbeev's Showcase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Xjq3hp9vkWo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Known issues:

- Mods that aim at breaking trees entirely (for example Tree Harvester or Create's saws) may have trouble getting all of the tree branches, or may even take a couple tries to chop it at all.
- If you have an older world and the nether/end are not working:
Please use [this datapack](https://github.com/Lightdrew/fix-nether-end-dims) to add the dimensions back, a previous world preset misconfiguration caused the save to miss the nether and end dimensions.

If you stumble upon any issues please report them! I'm sure I or some other talented and beautiful individual can help you out :)

## Credits

- Sbeev([Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/c/sbeev)/[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sbeevyt)/[Github](https://github.com/SbeevYT)), [awakaxis](https://github.com/awakaxis), Bimbatus for the original mod,
- HarlockDev([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/HarlockDev)/[Github](https://github.com/HarlockDevv)) for the sapling overrides,
- [vaakx-dev](https://github.com/vaakx-dev) for the tree feature placement mixins.
